description: Remote agents poll nexus for workplan tasks, execute locally with ADR-005 gates, report results to SpacetimeDB. Enables hex plan report for all executions and cross-agent RL learning.

phases.name: Worker poll loop
phases.description: hex agent worker polls nexus for tasks, executes locally, reports back

gate.command: cargo test -p hex-cli worker && cargo check --workspace

tasks.name: Add /api/hexflo/tasks/poll endpoint
tasks.description: New GET endpoint in hex-nexus/src/routes/swarms.rs. Accepts agent_id and role query params. Returns the next unassigned task matching the agent's role, atomically assigns it (CAS). Returns 204 No Content when no tasks available.

tasks.name: Implement hex agent worker command
tasks.description: New subcommand in hex-cli/src/commands/agent.rs. Connects to nexus, registers agent, enters poll loop (2s interval). On task receipt: run Ollama inference with tier model, execute ADR-005 gate pipeline (compile + test + retry), PATCH task result back to nexus, POST RL reward. --once flag for single-task mode (testing). --role flag for agent specialization.

tasks.name: Worker unit tests
tasks.description: Tests: (a) worker polls and receives task, (b) worker executes and reports success, (c) worker retries on compile failure, (d) worker escalates after max iterations, (e) --once mode exits after one task. Mock the nexus API with httpmock.

tasks.name: E2E: worker on bazzite executes one task
tasks.description: SSH to bazzite, start hex agent worker --once --nexus http://localhost:5556, create a T2 HexFlo task on coordinator, verify worker picks it up, generates code, reports result back. Assert: task status=completed in SpacetimeDB, generated code in result field.

phases.name: Coordinator dispatch
phases.description: hex plan execute registers in SpacetimeDB and delegates to workers

gate.command: cargo test -p hex-nexus workplan && cargo check --workspace

tasks.name: Register execution in SpacetimeDB from hex plan execute
tasks.description: When nexus is reachable, hex plan execute POSTs to /api/workplan/execute which creates a workplan_execution record in SpacetimeDB with id, workplan_path, status=running, started_at. Each task becomes a HexFlo swarm task assigned by tier→agent role mapping.

tasks.name: Phase gate monitoring via SpacetimeDB
tasks.description: After creating tasks for a phase, coordinator subscribes to SpacetimeDB task completion events. When all tasks in a phase are completed, runs the phase gate command. If gate passes, advances to next phase. If gate fails, marks execution as failed with gate output.

tasks.name: Task reassignment on worker failure
tasks.description: If a worker reports task failure (all iterations exhausted), coordinator checks for other available agents. If a higher-tier model is available on another agent, reassign. If no agents available, mark task as escalate and notify via inbox.

phases.name: Reporting and RL aggregation
phases.description: hex plan report reads from SpacetimeDB, RL rewards aggregate across agents

tasks.name: hex plan report reads from SpacetimeDB
tasks.description: Update hex plan report to query SpacetimeDB for execution records. Show: phases, tasks with agent assignments, gate results (pass/fail + error), iteration count, token usage, duration. Works for both local and remote executions.

tasks.name: Cross-agent RL reward aggregation
tasks.description: Workers POST RL rewards to coordinator nexus which forwards to SpacetimeDB rl-engine. The coordinator's Q-table accumulates rewards from all agents. Add hex inference rl-report command showing Q-values, visit counts, and per-agent contribution.

tasks.name: E2E: coordinated workplan on bazzite with report
tasks.description: Full end-to-end: hex plan execute on coordinator, bazzite worker executes tasks, coordinator generates report. Verify: SpacetimeDB has execution + task records, hex plan report shows correct data, RL Q-table has entries from remote agent.
